hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$BRANCH" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then exit 0; fi; git fetch origin main -q 2>/dev/null; AHEAD=$(git rev-list origin/main..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null); if [ "$AHEAD" = "0" ]; then exit 0; fi; git checkout main -q; if git merge --no-ff "$BRANCH" -m "Auto-merge $BRANCH into main" -q 2>/dev/null; then git push -u origin main -q 2>/dev/null; fi; git checkout "$BRANCH" -q 2>/dev/null; exit 0
